lineage.Process: AddField "X:/Xplor Datasets/Cohort Data/2025 Cohort/Orogen Royalties/Organized/Geology/Schemed/Lithology/wygeol_dd_polygon.shp" OBJECTID "Double (64-bit floating point)" # # # OBJECTID NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
